title: Sable: Weighted - Design n' Decor
description: Design n' Decor x Sable Physics Compatibility
body:
Adds full block physics weighting for Create Deco when using the Sable physics system.

---

**Features**
- Complete coverage of Design n' Decor blocks
- Realistic mass scaling _on flooring materials only_
- Form-based weighting (bolts, chains, cogwheels, etc.)
- Adjusted volume for partial blocks (slabs, stairs)
- Lightweight handling for thin geometry (bars, ladders, mesh, windows)
- Consistent behavior across decorative and structural elements

---

**Installation:**
Simply place this mod jar inside your `mods` folder
